chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI FRA No. 39 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge Direction For order on maintainability 03.10.2025 Respondent present in person ---------- Appellant who is also an advocate and appearing in person in this lis is not present. On 16.09.2025 and 26.09.2025, this Court has directed appellant to satisfy the Court on maintainability of this appeal. Today none is present. No intimation is received. In view of above said orders of this Court and the Judgment of the Supreme Court of Pakistan in Cr. Petition No.39-K/2025 dated 30.06.2025, this FRA is dismissed for non-prosecution. J U D G E Ashraf
